title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Community Development and Small Businesses to make an investigation and study of a certain current Senate document relative to create the engaging neighborhoods, organizations, unions, governments, and households fund.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, June 12, 2026 -- The committee on Community Development and Small Businesses, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3022) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Sal N. DiDomenico and Pavel M. Payano for legislation relative to creating the engaging neighborhoods, organizations, unions, governments, and households fund, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 3127).

actions.description:
Reported from the committee on Community Development and Small Businesses
 (under JR10)
Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
